verses.quran_arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ تَنزِيلُ ٱلْكِتَٰبِ مِنَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْحَكِيمِ
verses.text: The sending down of the Book is from God, the Mighty, the Wise.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّآ أَنزَلْنَآ إِلَيْكَ ٱلْكِتَٰبَ بِٱلْحَقِّ فَٱعْبُدِ ٱللَّهَ مُخْلِصًۭا لَّهُ ٱلدِّينَ
verses.text: Surely We have sent down to you the Book with the truth. So serve God, devoting (your) religion to Him.

verses.quran_arabic: أَلَا لِلَّهِ ٱلدِّينُ ٱلْخَالِصُ ۚ وَٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّخَذُوا۟ مِن دُونِهِۦٓ أَوْلِيَآءَ مَا نَعْبُدُهُمْ إِلَّا لِيُقَرِّبُونَآ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ زُلْفَىٰٓ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَحْكُمُ بَيْنَهُمْ فِى مَا هُمْ فِيهِ يَخْتَلِفُونَ ۗ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يَهْدِى مَنْ هُوَ كَٰذِبٌۭ كَفَّارٌۭ
verses.text: Is it not (a fact) that pure religion is for God (alone)? But those who take allies instead of Him – ’We only serve them so that they may bring us near to God in intimacy’ – surely God will judge between them concerning their differences. Surely God does not guide anyone who is a liar (or) ungrateful.

verses.quran_arabic: لَّوْ أَرَادَ ٱللَّهُ أَن يَتَّخِذَ وَلَدًۭا لَّٱصْطَفَىٰ مِمَّا يَخْلُقُ مَا يَشَآءُ ۚ سُبْحَٰنَهُۥ ۖ هُوَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلْوَٰحِدُ ٱلْقَهَّارُ
verses.text: If God wanted to take a son, He would indeed have chosen whatever He pleased from what He created. Glory to Him! He is God, the One, the Supreme.

verses.quran_arabic: خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ بِٱلْحَقِّ ۖ يُكَوِّرُ ٱلَّيْلَ عَلَى ٱلنَّهَارِ وَيُكَوِّرُ ٱلنَّهَارَ عَلَى ٱلَّيْلِ ۖ وَسَخَّرَ ٱلشَّمْسَ وَٱلْقَمَرَ ۖ كُلٌّۭ يَجْرِى لِأَجَلٍۢ مُّسَمًّى ۗ أَلَا هُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْغَفَّٰرُ
verses.text: He created the heavens and the earth in truth. He wraps the night around the day, and wraps the day around the night, and He has subjected the sun and the moon, each running (its course) for an appointed time. Is He not the Mighty, the Forgiver?

verses.quran_arabic: خَلَقَكُم مِّن نَّفْسٍۢ وَٰحِدَةٍۢ ثُمَّ جَعَلَ مِنْهَا زَوْجَهَا وَأَنزَلَ لَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَنْعَٰمِ ثَمَٰنِيَةَ أَزْوَٰجٍۢ ۚ يَخْلُقُكُمْ فِى بُطُونِ أُمَّهَٰتِكُمْ خَلْقًۭا مِّنۢ بَعْدِ خَلْقٍۢ فِى ظُلُمَٰتٍۢ ثَلَٰثٍۢ ۚ ذَٰلِكُمُ ٱللَّهُ رَبُّكُمْ لَهُ ٱلْمُلْكُ ۖ لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ۖ فَأَنَّىٰ تُصْرَفُونَ
verses.text: He created you from one person, (and) then made from him his wife, and He sent down to you four kinds of livestock. He creates you in the bellies of your mothers, creation after creation, in three darknesses. That is God, your Lord. To Him (belongs) the kingdom. (There is) no god but Him. How (is it that) you are turned away?

verses.quran_arabic: إِن تَكْفُرُوا۟ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ غَنِىٌّ عَنكُمْ ۖ وَلَا يَرْضَىٰ لِعِبَادِهِ ٱلْكُفْرَ ۖ وَإِن تَشْكُرُوا۟ يَرْضَهُ لَكُمْ ۗ وَلَا تَزِرُ وَازِرَةٌۭ وِزْرَ أُخْرَىٰ ۗ ثُمَّ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكُم مَّرْجِعُكُمْ فَيُنَبِّئُكُم بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ عَلِيمٌۢ بِذَاتِ ٱلصُّدُورِ
verses.text: If you are ungrateful – surely God is wealthy (enough) without you. Yet He does not approve ingratitude in His servants. If you are thankful, He approves it in you. No one bearing a burden bears the burden of another. Then to your Lord is your return, and He will inform you about what you have done. Surely he knows what is in the hearts.

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ وَإِذَا مَسَّ ٱلْإِنسَٰنَ ضُرٌّۭ دَعَا رَبَّهُۥ مُنِيبًا إِلَيْهِ ثُمَّ إِذَا خَوَّلَهُۥ نِعْمَةًۭ مِّنْهُ نَسِىَ مَا كَانَ يَدْعُوٓا۟ إِلَيْهِ مِن قَبْلُ وَجَعَلَ لِلَّهِ أَندَادًۭا لِّيُضِلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦ ۚ قُلْ تَمَتَّعْ بِكُفْرِكَ قَلِيلًا ۖ إِنَّكَ مِنْ أَصْحَٰبِ ٱلنَّارِ
verses.text: When hardship touches a person, he calls on his Lord, turning to Him (in repentance). Then, when He bestows blessing on him from Himself, he forgets what he was calling to Him for before, and sets up rivals to God to lead (people) astray from His way. Say: ‘Enjoy (life) in your disbelief for a little. Surely you will be one of the companions of the Fire.’

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ وَإِذَا مَسَّ اَ۬لۡإِنسَٰنَ ضُرّٞ دَعَا رَبَّهُۥ مُنِيبًا إِلَيۡهِ ثُمَّ إِذَا خَوَّلَهُۥ نِعۡمَةٗ مِّنۡهُ نَسِيَ مَا كَانَ يَدۡعُوٓاْ إِلَيۡهِ مِن قَبۡلُ وَجَعَلَ لِلَّهِ أَندَادٗا لِّيَضِلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦۚ قُلۡ تَمَتَّعۡ بِكُفۡرِكَ قَلِيلًا إِنَّكَ مِنۡ أَصۡحَٰبِ اِ۬لنّ۪ارِ
canonical_variants.english: And when some harm touches man, he calls upon his Lord, in penitence to Him. But then, when He confers on him a blessing of His, he forgets what he was previously calling upon for, and he sets up rivals to Allah in order to stray from His way. Say, “Enjoy yoursg denial for a little while; you are one of the fellows of the Fire.”

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ وَإِذَا مَسَّ اَ۬لۡإِنسَٰنَ ضُرّٞ دَعَا رَبَّهُۥ مُنِيبًا إِلَيۡهِ ثُمَّ إِذَا خَوَّلَهُۥ نِعۡمَةٗ  مِّنۡهُ نَسِيَ مَا كَانَ يَدۡعُواْ إِلَيۡهِ مِن قَبۡلُ وَجَعَل لِّلَّهِ أَندَادٗا لِّيَضِلَّ  عَن سَبِيلِهِۦۚ قُلۡ تَمَتَّعۡ بِكُفۡرِك قَّلِيلًا إِنَّكَ مِنۡ أَصۡحَٰبِ اِ۬لنّ۪ارِ
canonical_variants.english: And when some harm touches man, he calls upon his Lord, in penitence to Him. But then, when He confers on him a blessing of His, he forgets what he was previously calling upon for, and he sets up rivals to Allah in order to stray from His way. Say, “Enjoy yoursg denial for a little while; you are one of the fellows of the Fire.”

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ وَإِذَا مَسَّ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنَ ضُرّٞ دَعَا رَبَّهُۥ مُنِيبًا إِلَيۡهِۦ ثُمَّ إِذَا خَوَّلَهُۥ نِعۡمَةٗ مِّنۡهُۥ نَسِيَ مَا كَانَ يَدۡعُواْ إِلَيۡهِۦ مِن قَبۡلُ وَجَعَلَ لِلَّهِ أَندَادٗا لِّيَضِلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦۚ قُلۡ تَمَتَّعۡ بِكُفۡرِكَ قَلِيلًا إِنَّكَ مِنۡ أَصۡحَٰبِ ٱلنَّارِ
canonical_variants.english: And when some harm touches man, he calls upon his Lord, in penitence to Him. But then, when He confers on him a blessing of His, he forgets what he was previously calling upon for, and he sets up rivals to Allah in order to stray from His way. Say, “Enjoy yoursg denial for a little while; you are one of the fellows of the Fire.”

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ وَإِذَا مَسَّ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنَ ضُرّٞ دَعَا رَبَّهُۥ مُنِيبًا إِلَيۡهِۦ ثُمَّ إِذَا خَوَّلَهُۥ نِعۡمَةٗ مِّنۡهُۥ نَسِيَ مَا كَانَ يَدۡعُواْ إِلَيۡهِۦ مِن قَبۡلُ وَجَعَلَ لِلَّهِ أَندَادٗا لِّيَضِلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦۚ قُلۡ تَمَتَّعۡ بِكُفۡرِكَ قَلِيلًا إِنَّكَ مِنۡ أَصۡحَٰبِ ٱلنَّارِ
canonical_variants.english: And when some harm touches man, he calls upon his Lord, in penitence to Him. But then, when He confers on him a blessing of His, he forgets what he was previously calling upon for, and he sets up rivals to Allah in order to stray from His way. Say, “Enjoy yoursg denial for a little while; you are one of the fellows of the Fire.”

verses.quran_arabic: أَمَّنْ هُوَ قَٰنِتٌ ءَانَآءَ ٱلَّيْلِ سَاجِدًۭا وَقَآئِمًۭا يَحْذَرُ ٱلْءَاخِرَةَ وَيَرْجُوا۟ رَحْمَةَ رَبِّهِۦ ۗ قُلْ هَلْ يَسْتَوِى ٱلَّذِينَ يَعْلَمُونَ وَٱلَّذِينَ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ ۗ إِنَّمَا يَتَذَكَّرُ أُو۟لُوا۟ ٱلْأَلْبَٰبِ
verses.text: Or is he who is obedient in the hours of the night, prostrating himself and standing, bewaring the Hereafter and hoping for the mercy of his Lord [. . .]? Say: ‘Are those who know and those who do not know equal?’ Only those with understanding take heed.

canonical_variants.arabic: أَمَنۡ هُوَ قَٰنِتٌ ءَانَآءَ ٱلَّيۡلِ سَاجِدٗا وَقَآئِمٗا يَحۡذَرُ ٱلۡأٓخِرَةَ وَيَرۡجُواْ رَحۡمَةَ رَبِّهِۦۗ قُلۡ هَلۡ يَسۡتَوِي ٱلَّذِينَ يَعۡلَمُونَ وَٱلَّذِينَ لَا يَعۡلَمُونَۗ إِنَّمَا يَتَذَكَّرُ أُوْلُواْ ٱلۡأَلۡبَٰبِ
canonical_variants.english: What about one who worships devoutly during the watches of the night, prostrating himself and standing up, wary of the Hereafter and hoping for the mercy of his Lord? Saysg, “Are those who know and those who do not know equal?” Indeed, only those endowed with understanding remind themselves.

canonical_variants.arabic: أَمَنۡ هُوَ قَٰنِتٌ ءَانَآءَ ٱلَّيۡلِ سَاجِدٗا وَقَآئِمٗا يَحۡذَرُ ٱلۡأٓخِرَةَ وَيَرۡجُواْ رَحۡمَةَ رَبِّهِۦۗ قُلۡ هَلۡ يَسۡتَوِي ٱلَّذِينَ يَعۡلَمُونَ وَٱلَّذِينَ لَا يَعۡلَمُونَۗ إِنَّمَا يَتَذَكَّرُ أُوْلُواْ ٱلۡأَلۡبَٰبِ
canonical_variants.english: What about one who worships devoutly during the watches of the night, prostrating himself and standing up, wary of the Hereafter and hoping for the mercy of his Lord? Saysg, “Are those who know and those who do not know equal?” Indeed, only those endowed with understanding remind themselves.

canonical_variants.arabic: أَمَنْ هُوَ قَٰنِتٌ ءَانَآءَ اَ۬ليْلِ سَاجِداٗ وَقَآئِماٗ يَحْذَرُ اُ۬لْأٓخِرَةَ وَيَرْجُواْ رَحْمَةَ رَبِّهِۦۖ قُلْ هَلْ يَسْتَوِے اِ۬لذِينَ يَعْلَمُونَ وَالذِينَ لَا يَعْلَمُونَۖ إِنَّمَا يَتَذَكَّرُ أُوْلُواْ اُ۬لْأَلْبَٰبِۖ
canonical_variants.english: What about one who worships devoutly during the watches of the night, prostrating himself and standing up, wary of the Hereafter and hoping for the mercy of his Lord? Saysg, “Are those who know and those who do not know equal?” Indeed, only those endowed with understanding remind themselves.

canonical_variants.arabic: أَمَنْ هُوَ قَٰنِتٌ اٰنَآءَ اَ۬ليْلِ سَاجِداٗ وَقَآئِماٗ يَحْذَرُ اُ۬لَاخِرَةَ وَيَرْجُواْ رَحْمَةَ رَبِّهِۦۖ قُلْ هَلْ يَسْتَوِے اِ۬لذِينَ يَعْلَمُونَ وَالذِينَ لَا يَعْلَمُونَۖ إِنَّمَا يَتَذَكَّرُ أُوْلُواْ اُ۬لَالْبَٰبِۖ
canonical_variants.english: What about one who worships devoutly during the watches of the night, prostrating himself and standing up, wary of the Hereafter and hoping for the mercy of his Lord? Saysg, “Are those who know and those who do not know equal?” Indeed, only those endowed with understanding remind themselves.

verses.quran_arabic: قُلْ يَٰعِبَادِ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ٱتَّقُوا۟ رَبَّكُمْ ۚ لِلَّذِينَ أَحْسَنُوا۟ فِى هَٰذِهِ ٱلدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةٌۭ ۗ وَأَرْضُ ٱللَّهِ وَٰسِعَةٌ ۗ إِنَّمَا يُوَفَّى ٱلصَّٰبِرُونَ أَجْرَهُم بِغَيْرِ حِسَابٍۢ
verses.text: Say: ‘My servants who believe! Guard (yourselves) against your Lord. For those who do good in this present world, (there is) good, and God’s earth is wide. Surely the patient will be paid their reward in full without reckoning.’

verses.quran_arabic: قُلْ إِنِّىٓ أُمِرْتُ أَنْ أَعْبُدَ ٱللَّهَ مُخْلِصًۭا لَّهُ ٱلدِّينَ
verses.text: Say: ‘I have been commanded to serve God, devoting (my) religion to Him,

verses.quran_arabic: وَأُمِرْتُ لِأَنْ أَكُونَ أَوَّلَ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
verses.text: and I have been commanded to be the first of those who submit.’

verses.quran_arabic: قُلْ إِنِّىٓ أَخَافُ إِنْ عَصَيْتُ رَبِّى عَذَابَ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍۢ
verses.text: Say: ‘Surely I fear, if I disobey my Lord, the punishment of a great Day.’

verses.quran_arabic: قُلِ ٱللَّهَ أَعْبُدُ مُخْلِصًۭا لَّهُۥ دِينِى
verses.text: Say: ‘I serve God, devoting my religion to Him.

verses.quran_arabic: فَٱعْبُدُوا۟ مَا شِئْتُم مِّن دُونِهِۦ ۗ قُلْ إِنَّ ٱلْخَٰسِرِينَ ٱلَّذِينَ خَسِرُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَهُمْ وَأَهْلِيهِمْ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَٰمَةِ ۗ أَلَا ذَٰلِكَ هُوَ ٱلْخُسْرَانُ ٱلْمُبِينُ
verses.text: So serve whatever you please instead of Him.’ Say: ‘Surely the losers are those who lose themselves and their families on the Day of Resurrection. Is that not – it is the clearest loss!

verses.quran_arabic: لَهُم مِّن فَوْقِهِمْ ظُلَلٌۭ مِّنَ ٱلنَّارِ وَمِن تَحْتِهِمْ ظُلَلٌۭ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ يُخَوِّفُ ٱللَّهُ بِهِۦ عِبَادَهُۥ ۚ يَٰعِبَادِ فَٱتَّقُونِ
verses.text: For them (there are) shadows of fire above them, and shadows (of fire) below them. That is what God frightens His servants with: “My servants! Guard (yourselves) against Me!”’

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ ٱجْتَنَبُوا۟ ٱلطَّٰغُوتَ أَن يَعْبُدُوهَا وَأَنَابُوٓا۟ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ لَهُمُ ٱلْبُشْرَىٰ ۚ فَبَشِّرْ عِبَادِ
verses.text: Those who avoid al-Ṭāghūt – for fear that they serve it – and turn to God (in repentance) – for them (there is) good news. So give good news to My servants,

verses.quran_arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يَسْتَمِعُونَ ٱلْقَوْلَ فَيَتَّبِعُونَ أَحْسَنَهُۥٓ ۚ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ هَدَىٰهُمُ ٱللَّهُ ۖ وَأُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ هُمْ أُو۟لُوا۟ ٱلْأَلْبَٰبِ
verses.text: those who listen to the word and follow the best of it. Those are the ones whom God has guided, and those – they are those with understanding.

verses.quran_arabic: أَفَمَنْ حَقَّ عَلَيْهِ كَلِمَةُ ٱلْعَذَابِ أَفَأَنتَ تُنقِذُ مَن فِى ٱلنَّارِ
verses.text: So is the one against whom the word of punishment is proved true – will you save the one who is (already) in the Fire?

verses.quran_arabic: لَٰكِنِ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّقَوْا۟ رَبَّهُمْ لَهُمْ غُرَفٌۭ مِّن فَوْقِهَا غُرَفٌۭ مَّبْنِيَّةٌۭ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَٰرُ ۖ وَعْدَ ٱللَّهِ ۖ لَا يُخْلِفُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلْمِيعَادَ
verses.text: But those who guard (themselves) against their Lord – for them (there will be) exalted rooms, above which exalted rooms are built, (and) below which rivers flow – the promise of God! God will not break the appointment.

verses.quran_arabic: أَلَمْ تَرَ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ أَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءًۭ فَسَلَكَهُۥ يَنَٰبِيعَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ثُمَّ يُخْرِجُ بِهِۦ زَرْعًۭا مُّخْتَلِفًا أَلْوَٰنُهُۥ ثُمَّ يَهِيجُ فَتَرَىٰهُ مُصْفَرًّۭا ثُمَّ يَجْعَلُهُۥ حُطَٰمًا ۚ إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَذِكْرَىٰ لِأُو۟لِى ٱلْأَلْبَٰبِ
verses.text: Do you not see that God has sent down water from the sky, and put it into the earth as springs, (and) then by means of it He brings forth crops of various colors, (and) then they wither, and you see them turning yellow, (and) then He makes them broken debris? Surely in that is a reminder indeed to those with understanding.

verses.quran_arabic: أَفَمَن شَرَحَ ٱللَّهُ صَدْرَهُۥ لِلْإِسْلَٰمِ فَهُوَ عَلَىٰ نُورٍۢ مِّن رَّبِّهِۦ ۚ فَوَيْلٌۭ لِّلْقَٰسِيَةِ قُلُوبُهُم مِّن ذِكْرِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ فِى ضَلَٰلٍۢ مُّبِينٍ
verses.text: Is the one whose heart God has expanded to Islam, and so he (depends) on a light from his Lord [. . .]? Woe to those whose hearts are hardened against the remembrance of God! Those are clearly astray.

verses.quran_arabic: ٱللَّهُ نَزَّلَ أَحْسَنَ ٱلْحَدِيثِ كِتَٰبًۭا مُّتَشَٰبِهًۭا مَّثَانِىَ تَقْشَعِرُّ مِنْهُ جُلُودُ ٱلَّذِينَ يَخْشَوْنَ رَبَّهُمْ ثُمَّ تَلِينُ جُلُودُهُمْ وَقُلُوبُهُمْ إِلَىٰ ذِكْرِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ هُدَى ٱللَّهِ يَهْدِى بِهِۦ مَن يَشَآءُ ۚ وَمَن يُضْلِلِ ٱللَّهُ فَمَا لَهُۥ مِنْ هَادٍ
verses.text: God has sent down the best proclamation – a Book, resembling (itself), oft-repeating. The skins of those who fear their Lord shiver from it. Then their skins and their hearts soften to the remembrance of God. That is the guidance of God. He guides by means of it whomever He pleases, but whoever God leads astray has no guide.

verses.quran_arabic: أَفَمَن يَتَّقِى بِوَجْهِهِۦ سُوٓءَ ٱلْعَذَابِ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَٰمَةِ ۚ وَقِيلَ لِلظَّٰلِمِينَ ذُوقُوا۟ مَا كُنتُمْ تَكْسِبُونَ
verses.text: Is he who guards (himself) with his face against the evil of the punishment on the Day of Resurrection [. . .]? But it will be said to the evildoers, ‘Taste what you have earned!’

verses.quran_arabic: كَذَّبَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ فَأَتَىٰهُمُ ٱلْعَذَابُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَشْعُرُونَ
verses.text: Those who were before them called (it) a lie, and the punishment came upon them from where they did not realize (it would).

verses.quran_arabic: فَأَذَاقَهُمُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلْخِزْىَ فِى ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنْيَا ۖ وَلَعَذَابُ ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ أَكْبَرُ ۚ لَوْ كَانُوا۟ يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: So God made them taste disgrace in this present life, but the punishment of the Hereafter is indeed greater, if (only) they knew.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ ضَرَبْنَا لِلنَّاسِ فِى هَٰذَا ٱلْقُرْءَانِ مِن كُلِّ مَثَلٍۢ لَّعَلَّهُمْ يَتَذَكَّرُونَ
verses.text: Certainly We have struck in this Qur’ān every (kind of) parable for the people, so that they may take heed

verses.quran_arabic: قُرْءَانًا عَرَبِيًّا غَيْرَ ذِى عِوَجٍۢ لَّعَلَّهُمْ يَتَّقُونَ
verses.text: – an Arabic Qur’ān, without any crookedness, so that they may guard (themselves).

verses.quran_arabic: ضَرَبَ ٱللَّهُ مَثَلًۭا رَّجُلًۭا فِيهِ شُرَكَآءُ مُتَشَٰكِسُونَ وَرَجُلًۭا سَلَمًۭا لِّرَجُلٍ هَلْ يَسْتَوِيَانِ مَثَلًا ۚ ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ۚ بَلْ أَكْثَرُهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: God has struck a parable: a man concerning whom partners are quarreling, and a man belonging to one man. Are they both equal in comparison? Praise (be) to God! No! But most of them do not know (it).

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّكَ مَيِّتٌۭ وَإِنَّهُم مَّيِّتُونَ
verses.text: Surely you are mortal, and surely they are mortal,

verses.quran_arabic: ثُمَّ إِنَّكُمْ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَٰمَةِ عِندَ رَبِّكُمْ تَخْتَصِمُونَ
verses.text: and surely on the Day of Resurrection you will dispute in the presence of your Lord.

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ فَمَنْ أَظْلَمُ مِمَّن كَذَبَ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ وَكَذَّبَ بِٱلصِّدْقِ إِذْ جَآءَهُۥٓ ۚ أَلَيْسَ فِى جَهَنَّمَ مَثْوًۭى لِّلْكَٰفِرِينَ
verses.text: Who is more evil than the one who lies against God, and calls the truth a lie when it comes to him? Is there not a dwelling place in Gehenna for the disbelievers?

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱلَّذِى جَآءَ بِٱلصِّدْقِ وَصَدَّقَ بِهِۦٓ ۙ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْمُتَّقُونَ
verses.text: But the one who brings the truth and confirms it, those – they are the ones who guard (themselves).

verses.quran_arabic: لَهُم مَّا يَشَآءُونَ عِندَ رَبِّهِمْ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ جَزَآءُ ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ
verses.text: They will have whatever they please with their Lord. That is the payment of the doers of good

verses.quran_arabic: لِيُكَفِّرَ ٱللَّهُ عَنْهُمْ أَسْوَأَ ٱلَّذِى عَمِلُوا۟ وَيَجْزِيَهُمْ أَجْرَهُم بِأَحْسَنِ ٱلَّذِى كَانُوا۟ يَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: – so that God may absolve them of the worst of what they have done, and pay them their reward for the best of what they have done.

verses.quran_arabic: أَلَيْسَ ٱللَّهُ بِكَافٍ عَبْدَهُۥ ۖ وَيُخَوِّفُونَكَ بِٱلَّذِينَ مِن دُونِهِۦ ۚ وَمَن يُضْلِلِ ٱللَّهُ فَمَا لَهُۥ مِنْ هَادٍۢ
verses.text: Is God not sufficient for His servant, when they frighten you with (gods) other than Him? Whoever God leads astray has no guide,

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَن يَهْدِ ٱللَّهُ فَمَا لَهُۥ مِن مُّضِلٍّ ۗ أَلَيْسَ ٱللَّهُ بِعَزِيزٍۢ ذِى ٱنتِقَامٍۢ
verses.text: but whoever God guides – no one (will) lead him astray. Is God not mighty, a taker of vengeance?

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَئِن سَأَلْتَهُم مَّنْ خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ لَيَقُولُنَّ ٱللَّهُ ۚ قُلْ أَفَرَءَيْتُم مَّا تَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ إِنْ أَرَادَنِىَ ٱللَّهُ بِضُرٍّ هَلْ هُنَّ كَٰشِفَٰتُ ضُرِّهِۦٓ أَوْ أَرَادَنِى بِرَحْمَةٍ هَلْ هُنَّ مُمْسِكَٰتُ رَحْمَتِهِۦ ۚ قُلْ حَسْبِىَ ٱللَّهُ ۖ عَلَيْهِ يَتَوَكَّلُ ٱلْمُتَوَكِّلُونَ
verses.text: If indeed you ask them, ‘Who created the heavens and the earth?,’ they will indeed say, ‘God.’ Say: ‘Do you see what you call on instead of God? If God intends any harm for me, will they be removers of His harm? Or if He intends any mercy for me, will they be withholders of His mercy?’ Say: ‘God is enough for me. In Him the trusting put their trust.’

verses.quran_arabic: قُلْ يَٰقَوْمِ ٱعْمَلُوا۟ عَلَىٰ مَكَانَتِكُمْ إِنِّى عَٰمِلٌۭ ۖ فَسَوْفَ تَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: Say: ‘My people! Do as you are able. Surely I am going to do (what I can). Soon you will know

canonical_variants.arabic: قُلۡ يَٰقَوۡمِ ٱعۡمَلُواْ عَلَىٰ مَكَانَٰتِكُمۡ إِنِّي عَٰمِلٞۖ فَسَوۡفَ تَعۡلَمُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Say, ‘My people, act according to your positions; surely, I am also acting (according to mine). Then you shall come to know

canonical_variants.arabic: قُلۡ يَٰقَوۡمِ ٱعۡمَلُواْ عَلَىٰ مَكَانَتِكُمۡ إِنِّي عَٰمِلٞۖ فَسَوۡفَ تَعۡلَمُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Say, ‘My people, act according to your position; surely, I am also acting (according to mine). Then you shall come to know

verses.quran_arabic: مَن يَأْتِيهِ عَذَابٌۭ يُخْزِيهِ وَيَحِلُّ عَلَيْهِ عَذَابٌۭ مُّقِيمٌ
verses.text: on whom punishment will come, disgracing him. On him a lasting punishment will descend.’

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّآ أَنزَلْنَا عَلَيْكَ ٱلْكِتَٰبَ لِلنَّاسِ بِٱلْحَقِّ ۖ فَمَنِ ٱهْتَدَىٰ فَلِنَفْسِهِۦ ۖ وَمَن ضَلَّ فَإِنَّمَا يَضِلُّ عَلَيْهَا ۖ وَمَآ أَنتَ عَلَيْهِم بِوَكِيلٍ
verses.text: Surely We have sent down on you the Book for the people with the truth. Whoever is (rightly) guided, is guided only for himself, and whoever goes astray, goes astray only against himself. You are not a guardian over them.

verses.quran_arabic: ٱللَّهُ يَتَوَفَّى ٱلْأَنفُسَ حِينَ مَوْتِهَا وَٱلَّتِى لَمْ تَمُتْ فِى مَنَامِهَا ۖ فَيُمْسِكُ ٱلَّتِى قَضَىٰ عَلَيْهَا ٱلْمَوْتَ وَيُرْسِلُ ٱلْأُخْرَىٰٓ إِلَىٰٓ أَجَلٍۢ مُّسَمًّى ۚ إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَءَايَٰتٍۢ لِّقَوْمٍۢ يَتَفَكَّرُونَ
verses.text: God takes the self at the time of its death, and that which has not died in its sleep, and He retains the one for whom He has decreed death, but sends back the other until an appointed time. Surely in that are signs indeed for a people who reflect.

verses.quran_arabic: أَمِ ٱتَّخَذُوا۟ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ شُفَعَآءَ ۚ قُلْ أَوَلَوْ كَانُوا۟ لَا يَمْلِكُونَ شَيْـًۭٔا وَلَا يَعْقِلُونَ
verses.text: Or have they taken intercessors instead of God? Say: ‘Even if they possess nothing and do not understand?’

verses.quran_arabic: قُل لِّلَّهِ ٱلشَّفَٰعَةُ جَمِيعًۭا ۖ لَّهُۥ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ ثُمَّ إِلَيْهِ تُرْجَعُونَ
verses.text: Say: ‘Intercession (belongs) to God altogether. To Him (belongs) the kingdom of the heavens and the earth. Then to Him you will be returned.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذَا ذُكِرَ ٱللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ ٱشْمَأَزَّتْ قُلُوبُ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱلْءَاخِرَةِ ۖ وَإِذَا ذُكِرَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن دُونِهِۦٓ إِذَا هُمْ يَسْتَبْشِرُونَ
verses.text: When God is mentioned alone, the hearts of those who do not believe in the Hereafter shrink, but when those (gods) are mentioned instead of Him, suddenly they welcome the good news.

verses.quran_arabic: قُلِ ٱللَّهُمَّ فَاطِرَ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ عَٰلِمَ ٱلْغَيْبِ وَٱلشَّهَٰدَةِ أَنتَ تَحْكُمُ بَيْنَ عِبَادِكَ فِى مَا كَانُوا۟ فِيهِ يَخْتَلِفُونَ
verses.text: Say: ‘God! Creator of the heavens and the earth, Knower of the unseen and the seen, You will judge between your servants concerning their differences.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَوْ أَنَّ لِلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ مَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ جَمِيعًۭا وَمِثْلَهُۥ مَعَهُۥ لَٱفْتَدَوْا۟ بِهِۦ مِن سُوٓءِ ٱلْعَذَابِ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَٰمَةِ ۚ وَبَدَا لَهُم مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ مَا لَمْ يَكُونُوا۟ يَحْتَسِبُونَ
verses.text: (Even) if those who have done evil had what is on the earth – all (of it) – and as much again, they would indeed (try to) ransom (themselves) with it from the evil of the punishment on the Day of Resurrection. But what they were not counting on will become apparent to them from God,

verses.quran_arabic: وَبَدَا لَهُمْ سَيِّـَٔاتُ مَا كَسَبُوا۟ وَحَاقَ بِهِم مَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
verses.text: and the evils of what they have earned will become apparent to them, and what they were mocking will overwhelm them.

verses.quran_arabic: فَإِذَا مَسَّ ٱلْإِنسَٰنَ ضُرٌّۭ دَعَانَا ثُمَّ إِذَا خَوَّلْنَٰهُ نِعْمَةًۭ مِّنَّا قَالَ إِنَّمَآ أُوتِيتُهُۥ عَلَىٰ عِلْمٍۭ ۚ بَلْ هِىَ فِتْنَةٌۭ وَلَٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: When hardship touches a person, he calls on Us. Then, when We bestow blessing on him from Us, he says, ‘I have only been given it because of knowledge.’ No! It is a test, but most of them do not know (it).

verses.quran_arabic: قَدْ قَالَهَا ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ فَمَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنْهُم مَّا كَانُوا۟ يَكْسِبُونَ
verses.text: Those who were before them said it (too), but what they earned was of no use to them,

verses.quran_arabic: فَأَصَابَهُمْ سَيِّـَٔاتُ مَا كَسَبُوا۟ ۚ وَٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ مِنْ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ سَيُصِيبُهُمْ سَيِّـَٔاتُ مَا كَسَبُوا۟ وَمَا هُم بِمُعْجِزِينَ
verses.text: and the evils of what they earned smote them. And those of these (people) who have done evil – the evils of what they have earned will smite them (too), and they will not be able to escape.

verses.quran_arabic: أَوَلَمْ يَعْلَمُوٓا۟ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَبْسُطُ ٱلرِّزْقَ لِمَن يَشَآءُ وَيَقْدِرُ ۚ إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَءَايَٰتٍۢ لِّقَوْمٍۢ يُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.text: Do they not know that God extends (His) provision to whomever He pleases, and restricts (it)? Surely in that are signs indeed for a people who believe.

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ قُلْ يَٰعِبَادِىَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَسْرَفُوا۟ عَلَىٰٓ أَنفُسِهِمْ لَا تَقْنَطُوا۟ مِن رَّحْمَةِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَغْفِرُ ٱلذُّنُوبَ جَمِيعًا ۚ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْغَفُورُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.text: Say: ‘My servants who have acted wantonly against themselves! Do not despair of the mercy of God. Surely God forgives sins – all (of them). Surely He – He is the Forgiving, the Compassionate.

verses.quran_arabic: وَأَنِيبُوٓا۟ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكُمْ وَأَسْلِمُوا۟ لَهُۥ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يَأْتِيَكُمُ ٱلْعَذَابُ ثُمَّ لَا تُنصَرُونَ
verses.text: Turn to your Lord (in repentance), and submit to Him, before the punishment comes upon you, (for) then you will not be helped.

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱتَّبِعُوٓا۟ أَحْسَنَ مَآ أُنزِلَ إِلَيْكُم مِّن رَّبِّكُم مِّن قَبْلِ أَن يَأْتِيَكُمُ ٱلْعَذَابُ بَغْتَةًۭ وَأَنتُمْ لَا تَشْعُرُونَ
verses.text: Follow the best of what has been sent down to you from your Lord, before the punishment comes upon you unexpectedly, when you do not realize (it)’

verses.quran_arabic: أَن تَقُولَ نَفْسٌۭ يَٰحَسْرَتَىٰ عَلَىٰ مَا فَرَّطتُ فِى جَنۢبِ ٱللَّهِ وَإِن كُنتُ لَمِنَ ٱلسَّٰخِرِينَ
verses.text: – in case anyone (should) say, ‘Alas for me, in regard to what I neglected concerning God, for I was indeed one of the scoffers!’

verses.quran_arabic: أَوْ تَقُولَ لَوْ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ هَدَىٰنِى لَكُنتُ مِنَ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ
verses.text: Or say, ‘If only God had guided me, I would indeed have been one of those who guard (themselves)!’

verses.quran_arabic: أَوْ تَقُولَ حِينَ تَرَى ٱلْعَذَابَ لَوْ أَنَّ لِى كَرَّةًۭ فَأَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ
verses.text: Or say, when he sees the punishment, ‘If only I had (another) turn, and (could) be one of the doers of good!’

verses.quran_arabic: بَلَىٰ قَدْ جَآءَتْكَ ءَايَٰتِى فَكَذَّبْتَ بِهَا وَٱسْتَكْبَرْتَ وَكُنتَ مِنَ ٱلْكَٰفِرِينَ
verses.text: ‘Yes indeed! My signs did come to you, but you called them a lie, and were arrogant, and were one of the disbelievers.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَيَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَٰمَةِ تَرَى ٱلَّذِينَ كَذَبُوا۟ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ وُجُوهُهُم مُّسْوَدَّةٌ ۚ أَلَيْسَ فِى جَهَنَّمَ مَثْوًۭى لِّلْمُتَكَبِّرِينَ
verses.text: On the Day of Resurrection you will see those who lied against God, their faces blackened. Is there not a dwelling place in Gehenna for the arrogant?

verses.quran_arabic: وَيُنَجِّى ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّقَوْا۟ بِمَفَازَتِهِمْ لَا يَمَسُّهُمُ ٱلسُّوٓءُ وَلَا هُمْ يَحْزَنُونَ
verses.text: But God will rescue those who guarded (themselves) in their (place of) safety. Evil will not touch them, nor will they sorrow.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَيُنَجِّي ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّقَوۡاْ بِمَفَازَٰتِهِمۡ لَا يَمَسُّهُمُ ٱلسُّوٓءُ وَلَا هُمۡ يَحۡزَنُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And Allah delivers those who were mindful (of Him) to their places of triumph; no harm touches them, nor do they grieve.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَيُنَجِّي ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّقَوۡاْ بِمَفَازَتِهِمۡ لَا يَمَسُّهُمُ ٱلسُّوٓءُ وَلَا هُمۡ يَحۡزَنُونَ
canonical_variants.english: And Allah delivers those who were mindful (of Him) to their place of triumph; no harm touches them, nor do they grieve.

verses.quran_arabic: ٱللَّهُ خَٰلِقُ كُلِّ شَىْءٍۢ ۖ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍۢ وَكِيلٌۭ
verses.text: God is the Creator of everything. He is guardian over everything.

verses.quran_arabic: لَّهُۥ مَقَالِيدُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۗ وَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ بِـَٔايَٰتِ ٱللَّهِ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْخَٰسِرُونَ
verses.text: To Him (belong) the keys of the heavens and the earth. Those who disbelieve in the signs of God, those – they are the losers.

verses.quran_arabic: قُلْ أَفَغَيْرَ ٱللَّهِ تَأْمُرُوٓنِّىٓ أَعْبُدُ أَيُّهَا ٱلْجَٰهِلُونَ
verses.text: Say: ‘Do you command me to serve (anyone) other than God, you ignorant ones?’

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ أُوحِىَ إِلَيْكَ وَإِلَى ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِكَ لَئِنْ أَشْرَكْتَ لَيَحْبَطَنَّ عَمَلُكَ وَلَتَكُونَنَّ مِنَ ٱلْخَٰسِرِينَ
verses.text: You have been inspired, and those who were before you: ‘If indeed you associate, your deed(s) will indeed come to nothing, and you will indeed be one of the losers.’

verses.quran_arabic: بَلِ ٱللَّهَ فَٱعْبُدْ وَكُن مِّنَ ٱلشَّٰكِرِينَ
verses.text: No! Serve God, and be one of the thankful.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَا قَدَرُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ حَقَّ قَدْرِهِۦ وَٱلْأَرْضُ جَمِيعًۭا قَبْضَتُهُۥ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَٰمَةِ وَٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتُ مَطْوِيَّٰتٌۢ بِيَمِينِهِۦ ۚ سُبْحَٰنَهُۥ وَتَعَٰلَىٰ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
verses.text: They have not measured God (with) due measure, when the entire earth will be His handful on the Day of Resurrection, and the heavens will be rolled up in His right (hand). Glory to Him! He is exalted above what they associate.

verses.quran_arabic: وَنُفِخَ فِى ٱلصُّورِ فَصَعِقَ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَمَن فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ إِلَّا مَن شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ ۖ ثُمَّ نُفِخَ فِيهِ أُخْرَىٰ فَإِذَا هُمْ قِيَامٌۭ يَنظُرُونَ
verses.text: There will be a blast on the trumpet, and whoever is in the heavens and whoever is on the earth will be thunderstruck, except for those whom God pleases. Then there will be another blast on it, and suddenly they will stand up, looking around.

verses.quran_arabic: وَأَشْرَقَتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ بِنُورِ رَبِّهَا وَوُضِعَ ٱلْكِتَٰبُ وَجِا۟ىٓءَ بِٱلنَّبِيِّۦنَ وَٱلشُّهَدَآءِ وَقُضِىَ بَيْنَهُم بِٱلْحَقِّ وَهُمْ لَا يُظْلَمُونَ
verses.text: And the earth will shine with the light of its Lord, and the Book will be laid down, and the prophets and witnesses will be brought, and it will be decided between them in truth – and they will not be done evil.

verses.quran_arabic: وَوُفِّيَتْ كُلُّ نَفْسٍۢ مَّا عَمِلَتْ وَهُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا يَفْعَلُونَ
verses.text: Each one will be paid in full for what he has done, (for) He knows what they do.

verses.quran_arabic: وَسِيقَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓا۟ إِلَىٰ جَهَنَّمَ زُمَرًا ۖ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآءُوهَا فُتِحَتْ أَبْوَٰبُهَا وَقَالَ لَهُمْ خَزَنَتُهَآ أَلَمْ يَأْتِكُمْ رُسُلٌۭ مِّنكُمْ يَتْلُونَ عَلَيْكُمْ ءَايَٰتِ رَبِّكُمْ وَيُنذِرُونَكُمْ لِقَآءَ يَوْمِكُمْ هَٰذَا ۚ قَالُوا۟ بَلَىٰ وَلَٰكِنْ حَقَّتْ كَلِمَةُ ٱلْعَذَابِ عَلَى ٱلْكَٰفِرِينَ
verses.text: Those who disbelieved will be driven in companies into Gehenna, until, when they have come to it, its gates will be opened, and its keepers will say to them: ‘Did messengers not come to you from among you, reciting to you the signs of your Lord and warning you about the meeting of this Day of yours?’ They will say, ‘Yes indeed! But the word of punishment has proved true against the disbelievers.’

canonical_variants.arabic: وَسِيقَ اَ۬لَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓاْ إِلَىٰ جَهَنَّمَ زُمَرًاۖ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآءُوهَا فُتِّحَتۡ أَبۡوَٰبُهَا وَقَالَ لَهُمۡ خَزَنَتُهَآ أَلَمۡ يَأۡتِكُمۡ رُسُلٞ مِّنكُمۡ يَتۡلُونَ عَلَيۡكُمۡ ءَايَٰتِ رَبِّكُمۡ وَيُنذِرُونَكُمۡ لِقَآءَ يَوۡمِكُمۡ هَٰذَاۚ قَالُواْ بَلَىٰ وَلَٰكِنۡ حَقَّتۡ كَلِمَةُ اُ۬لۡعَذَابِ عَلَى اَ۬لۡكٰ۪فِرِينَ
canonical_variants.english: And those who denied were driven to Hell in throngs, until, when they had reached it, its gates were opened wide and its keepers said to them, “Did not messengers from among you come to you, reading to you the signs of your Lord and warning you of the meeting of this day of yours?” They said, “Yes, indeed!” But the word of punishment proved true against the deniers.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَسِيقَ اَ۬لَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ إِلَىٰ جَهَنَّمَ زُمَرًاۖ حَتَّىٰ إِذَا جَآءُوهَا  فُتِّحَتۡ أَبۡوَٰبُهَا وَقَال لَّهُمۡ خَزَنَتُهَا أَلَمۡ يَاتِكُمۡ رُسُلٞ مِّنكُمۡ  يَتۡلُونَ عَلَيۡكُمۡ ءَايَٰتِ رَبِّكُمۡ وَيُنذِرُونَكُمۡ لِقَآءَ يَوۡمِكُمۡ  هَٰذَاۚ قَالُواْ بَلَىٰ وَلَٰكِنۡ حَقَّتۡ كَلِمَةُ اُ۬لۡعَذَابِ عَلَى اَ۬لۡكٰ۪فِرِينَ
canonical_variants.english: And those who denied were driven to Hell in throngs, until, when they had reached it, its gates were opened wide and its keepers said to them, “Did not messengers from among you come to you, reading to you the signs of your Lord and warning you of the meeting of this day of yours?” They said, “Yes, indeed!” But the word of punishment proved true against the deniers.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَسِيقَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ إِلَىٰ جَهَنَّمَ زُمَرًاۖ حَتَّىٰ إِذَا جَآءُوهَا فُتِّحَتۡ أَبۡوَٰبُهَا وَقَالَ لَهُمُۥ خَزَنَتُهَا أَلَمۡ يَأۡتِكُمُۥ رُسُلٞ مِّنكُمُۥ يَتۡلُونَ عَلَيۡكُمُۥ ءَايَٰتِ رَبِّكُمُۥ وَيُنذِرُونَكُمُۥ لِقَآءَ يَوۡمِكُمُۥ هَٰذَاۚ قَالُواْ بَلَىٰ وَلَٰكِنۡ حَقَّتۡ كَلِمَةُ ٱلۡعَذَابِ عَلَى ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ
canonical_variants.english: And those who denied were driven to Hell in throngs, until, when they had reached it, its gates were opened wide and its keepers said to them, “Did not messengers from among you come to you, reading to you the signs of your Lord and warning you of the meeting of this day of yours?” They said, “Yes, indeed!” But the word of punishment proved true against the deniers.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَسِيقَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ إِلَىٰ جَهَنَّمَ زُمَرًاۖ حَتَّىٰ إِذَا جَآءُوهَا فُتِّحَتۡ أَبۡوَٰبُهَا وَقَالَ لَهُمُۥ خَزَنَتُهَا أَلَمۡ يَأۡتِكُمُۥ رُسُلٞ مِّنكُمُۥ يَتۡلُونَ عَلَيۡكُمُۥ ءَايَٰتِ رَبِّكُمُۥ وَيُنذِرُونَكُمُۥ لِقَآءَ يَوۡمِكُمُۥ هَٰذَاۚ قَالُواْ بَلَىٰ وَلَٰكِنۡ حَقَّتۡ كَلِمَةُ ٱلۡعَذَابِ عَلَى ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ
canonical_variants.english: And those who denied were driven to Hell in throngs, until, when they had reached it, its gates were opened wide and its keepers said to them, “Did not messengers from among you come to you, reading to you the signs of your Lord and warning you of the meeting of this day of yours?” They said, “Yes, indeed!” But the word of punishment proved true against the deniers.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَسِيقَ اَ۬لذِينَ كَفَرُواْ إِلَىٰ جَهَنَّمَ زُمَراًۖ حَتَّىٰ إِذَا جَآءُوهَا فُتِّحَتْ أَبْوَٰبُهَا وَقَالَ لَهُمْ خَزَنَتُهَا أَلَمْ يَأْتِكُمْ رُسُلٞ مِّنكُمْ يَتْلُونَ عَلَيْكُمْ ءَايَٰتِ رَبِّكُمْ وَيُنذِرُونَكُمْ لِقَآءَ يَوْمِكُمْ هَٰذَاۖ قَالُواْ بَلَىٰ وَلَٰكِنْ حَقَّتْ كَلِمَةُ اُ۬لْعَذَابِ عَلَى اَ۬لْكَٰفِرِينَۖ
canonical_variants.english: And those who denied were driven to Hell in throngs, until, when they had reached it, its gates were opened wide and its keepers said to them, “Did not messengers from among you come to you, reading to you the signs of your Lord and warning you of the meeting of this day of yours?” They said, “Yes, indeed!” But the word of punishment proved true against the deniers.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَسِيقَ اَ۬لذِينَ كَفَرُوٓاْ إِلَىٰ جَهَنَّمَ زُمَراًۖ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآءُوهَا فُتِّحَتَ اَبْوَٰبُهَا وَقَالَ لَهُمْ خَزَنَتُهَآ أَلَمْ يَاتِكُمْ رُسُلٞ مِّنكُمْ يَتْلُونَ عَلَيْكُمُۥٓ ءَايَٰتِ رَبِّكُمْ وَيُنذِرُونَكُمْ لِقَآءَ يَوْمِكُمْ هَٰذَاۖ قَالُواْ بَل۪ىٰ وَلَٰكِنْ حَقَّتْ كَلِمَةُ اُ۬لْعَذَابِ عَلَى اَ۬لْكٰ۪فِرِينَۖ
canonical_variants.english: And those who denied were driven to Hell in throngs, until, when they had reached it, its gates were opened wide and its keepers said to them, “Did not messengers from among you come to you, reading to you the signs of your Lord and warning you of the meeting of this day of yours?” They said, “Yes, indeed!” But the word of punishment proved true against the deniers.

verses.quran_arabic: قِيلَ ٱدْخُلُوٓا۟ أَبْوَٰبَ جَهَنَّمَ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا ۖ فَبِئْسَ مَثْوَى ٱلْمُتَكَبِّرِينَ
verses.text: It will be said, ‘Enter the gates of Gehenna, there to remain.’ Evil is the dwelling place of the arrogant!

verses.quran_arabic: وَسِيقَ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّقَوْا۟ رَبَّهُمْ إِلَى ٱلْجَنَّةِ زُمَرًا ۖ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآءُوهَا وَفُتِحَتْ أَبْوَٰبُهَا وَقَالَ لَهُمْ خَزَنَتُهَا سَلَٰمٌ عَلَيْكُمْ طِبْتُمْ فَٱدْخُلُوهَا خَٰلِدِينَ
verses.text: But those who guarded (themselves) against their Lord will be driven in companies into the Garden, until, when they have come to it, and its gates will be opened, and its keepers will say to them: ‘Peace (be) upon you! You have been good, so enter it, to remain (there).’

canonical_variants.arabic: وَسِيقَ اَ۬لَّذِينَ اَ۪تَّقَوۡاْ رَبَّهُمۡ إِلَى اَ۬لۡجَنَّةِ زُمَرًاۖ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآءُوهَا وَفُتِّحَتۡ أَبۡوَٰبُهَا وَقَالَ لَهُمۡ خَزَنَتُهَا سَلَٰمٌ عَلَيۡكُمۡ طِبۡتُمۡ فَاَدۡخُلُوهَا خَٰلِدِينَ
canonical_variants.english: And those who were mindful of their Lord were driven to the Garden (of Paradise) in throngs, until, when they had reached it and its gates were opened wide and its keepers said to them, “Peace be upon you, you have been good, so enter it, to abide.”

canonical_variants.arabic: وَسِيقَ اَ۬لَّذِينَ اَ۪تَّقَوۡاْ رَبَّهُمۡ إِلَى اَ۬لۡجَنَّة  زُّمَرًاۖ حَتَّىٰ إِذَا جَآءُوهَا وَفُتِّحَتۡ أَبۡوَٰبُهَا وَقَال لَّهُمۡ خَزَنَتُهَا  سَلَٰمٌ عَلَيۡكُمۡ طِبۡتُمۡ فَاَدۡخُلُوهَا خَٰلِدِينَ
canonical_variants.english: And those who were mindful of their Lord were driven to the Garden (of Paradise) in throngs, until, when they had reached it and its gates were opened wide and its keepers said to them, “Peace be upon you, you have been good, so enter it, to abide.”

canonical_variants.arabic: وَسِيقَ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّقَوۡاْ رَبَّهُمُۥ إِلَى ٱلۡجَنَّةِ زُمَرًاۖ حَتَّىٰ إِذَا جَآءُوهَا وَفُتِّحَتۡ أَبۡوَٰبُهَا وَقَالَ لَهُمُۥ خَزَنَتُهَا سَلَٰمٌ عَلَيۡكُمُۥ طِبۡتُمُۥ فَٱدۡخُلُوهَا خَٰلِدِينَ
canonical_variants.english: And those who were mindful of their Lord were driven to the Garden (of Paradise) in throngs, until, when they had reached it and its gates were opened wide and its keepers said to them, “Peace be upon you, you have been good, so enter it, to abide.”

canonical_variants.arabic: وَسِيقَ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّقَوۡاْ رَبَّهُمُۥ إِلَى ٱلۡجَنَّةِ زُمَرًاۖ حَتَّىٰ إِذَا جَآءُوهَا وَفُتِّحَتۡ أَبۡوَٰبُهَا وَقَالَ لَهُمُۥ خَزَنَتُهَا سَلَٰمٌ عَلَيۡكُمُۥ طِبۡتُمُۥ فَٱدۡخُلُوهَا خَٰلِدِينَ
canonical_variants.english: And those who were mindful of their Lord were driven to the Garden (of Paradise) in throngs, until, when they had reached it and its gates were opened wide and its keepers said to them, “Peace be upon you, you have been good, so enter it, to abide.”

canonical_variants.arabic: وَسِيقَ اَ۬لذِينَ اَ۪تَّقَوْاْ رَبَّهُمْ إِلَى اَ۬لْجَنَّةِ زُمَراًۖ حَتَّىٰ إِذَا جَآءُوهَا وَفُتِّحَتْ أَبْوَٰبُهَا وَقَالَ لَهُمْ خَزَنَتُهَا سَلَٰمٌ عَلَيْكُمْ طِبْتُمْ فَادْخُلُوهَا خَٰلِدِينَۖ
canonical_variants.english: And those who were mindful of their Lord were driven to the Garden (of Paradise) in throngs, until, when they had reached it and its gates were opened wide and its keepers said to them, “Peace be upon you, you have been good, so enter it, to abide.”

canonical_variants.arabic: وَسِيقَ اَ۬لذِينَ اَ۪تَّقَوْاْ رَبَّهُمُۥٓ إِلَى اَ۬لْجَنَّةِ زُمَراًۖ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآءُوهَا وَفُتِّحَتَ اَبْوَٰبُهَا وَقَالَ لَهُمْ خَزَنَتُهَا سَلَٰمٌ عَلَيْكُمْ طِبْتُمْ فَادْخُلُوهَا خَٰلِدِينَۖ
canonical_variants.english: And those who were mindful of their Lord were driven to the Garden (of Paradise) in throngs, until, when they had reached it and its gates were opened wide and its keepers said to them, “Peace be upon you, you have been good, so enter it, to abide.”

verses.quran_arabic: وَقَالُوا۟ ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِى صَدَقَنَا وَعْدَهُۥ وَأَوْرَثَنَا ٱلْأَرْضَ نَتَبَوَّأُ مِنَ ٱلْجَنَّةِ حَيْثُ نَشَآءُ ۖ فَنِعْمَ أَجْرُ ٱلْعَٰمِلِينَ
verses.text: They will say, ‘Praise (be) to God, who has fulfilled His promise to us, and has caused us to inherit the earth! We (may) settle in the Garden wherever we please.’ Excellent is the reward of the doers!

verses.quran_arabic: وَتَرَى ٱلْمَلَٰٓئِكَةَ حَآفِّينَ مِنْ حَوْلِ ٱلْعَرْشِ يُسَبِّحُونَ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّهِمْ ۖ وَقُضِىَ بَيْنَهُم بِٱلْحَقِّ وَقِيلَ ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ ٱلْعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: And you will see the angels completely surrounding the throne, glorifying their Lord with praise. It will be decided between them in truth, and it will be said, ‘Praise (be) to God, Lord of the worlds!’
